factors.rationale: The product is visible but competes with other elements in the image.
The setting hints at a lifestyle but does not clearly show the accessory in use.
The image suggests a positive vibe but does not communicate a specific benefit.
The layout has competing elements that make it somewhat hard to read.
The product is clear, but material quality is not emphasized.
There are some brand cues, but they are not central to the image.
The image is mostly readable, but some elements lack strong contrast.
The image is product-forward but does not clearly convey campaign intent.
